src: A man in a red t-shirt, khaki pants, and black sneakers stands against a white wall indoors. His posture is relaxed, arms at his sides, gazing slightly upward, on a gray carpeted floor with linear patterns.
edit: An anime character stands upright against a white wall indoors. He has expressive eyes typical of anime style and wears a red t-shirt, khaki pants with exaggerated folds, and black sneakers with white soles. His relaxed posture has arms at his sides, looking upward with expressive eyes. The carpet below has linear patterns.
